input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.15.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.15.2.1
            TITLE: the technical inspection process may be repeated in entirety or in part

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.15.2.1: The Technical Inspection process may be repeated in entirety or in part
IN.15.2.1 The Technical Inspection process may be repeated in entirety or in part

final_answer: The Technical Inspection process may be repeated in entirety or in part
